title: Lesa Parakkuthu Lyrics Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu
stanzas: <div>Lesa Parakkuthu Lyrics Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu

Kadhal pirakkindra
paruvam paruvam.
mounam purikindra
tharunam tharunam.
kangal kalakkindra
nimidam nimidam
kaalgal thodarkindra
nadanam nadanam.

Lesa parakkuthu
manasu manasu
edho nadakkudhu vayasula.

Lesa nazhuvudhu
kolusu kolusu
engae vizhunthadhu theriyala.

Sundeli valaiyila nellapol
undha nenappa
enakkulla serkkura.

allipoo kuzhathula
kalla pol undhan
kanvizhi thaakkida
suththi suththi ninnen.

karachaan kuruvikku
mayakkam mayakkam.
kanavula thinamum
medhakkum medhakkum
kadhal vandhathum
kudhikkum kudhikkum
siragaal vaanathai
idikkum idikkum.

Lesa parakkuthu
manasu manasu
edho nadakkudhu vayasula.

Lesa nazhuvudhu
kolusu kolusu
engae vizhunthadhu theriyala.

thaththi thaththi pogum
pachcha pulla pola
poththi vachchuthaane
manasu irundhadhu.
thiruvizhaa koottathil
tholaiyira sugamaa.

thondakuli thaandi
vaartha varavilla
ennennavo pesa
udhadu nenachathu
paarvaiya paarthadhum
idhamaa patharudhu.

raathiri pagalaa thaan
nenjil raatinam suthuthadi.
poottuna veettulathaan
pudhusa pattaampoochi
parakkudhadaa..

karachaan kuruvikku
mayakkam mayakkam.
kanavula thinamum
medhakkum medhakkum
kadhal vandhathum
kudhikkum kudhikkum
siragaal vaanathai
idikkum idikkum.

Lesa parakkuthu
manasu manasu
edho nadakkudhu vayasula.

poovaa viriyira ulagam ulagam
tharisaa kedanthadhu idhuvara

poththa maram pola
seththu kedanthanae
unna paartha pinne
usuru polachadhu.
sondhamaa kidaippiyaa
saamiya kaetpen.

retta jada potu
thulli thirinjene
unna paatha pinne
vetkam koranjathe.
unakkuthaan unakkuthan
boomiyil porandhaen.

kaavadi sumappathu pol
manasu kadhala
sumakkuthadaa.

kanavula nee varuva
adhanaal kannu
thoonguthadi.

karachaan kuruvikku
mayakkam mayakkam.
kanavula thinamum
medhakkum medhakkum
kadhal vandhathum
kudhikkum kudhikkum
siragaal vaanathai
idikkum idikkum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Lesa Parakkuthu?

The song captures the essence of youthful romance and the tender emotions associated with it.

Who are the singers of Lesa Parakkuthu?

The song is beautifully sung by Chinmayi and Karthik.

Who composed the music for Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu?

The music for the film was composed by Selvaganesh.

What is the release year of Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu?

The movie was released in 2009.

What emotions does Lesa Parakkuthu evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, happiness, and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu, the song Lesa Parakkuthu beautifully portrays the blossoming of young love. Sung by Chinmayi and Karthik, the melody captures the tender and soothing emotions of a romantic relationship. The lyrics by Na Muthukumar add depth to the feelings of joy and affection. Selvaganesh's music complements the theme, making it a memorable and heartwarming experience. The song conveys a sense of happiness and the innocence of first love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the gentle romance of Lesa Parakkuthu from the film Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu. This beautiful duet by Chinmayi and Karthik, with lyrics by Na Muthukumar and music by Selvaganesh, captures the essence of youthful love. Let the soothing melody transport you to a world of tender emotions and heartfelt moments.
stanzaMeanings: Love is being born in this season. Silence is understood at this moment. Eyes are confused every minute. Feet continue to dance.
The heart is flying lightly, something is happening at this age.
The anklet is slipping lightly, I don't know where it fell.
Like a mouse in a trap, this thought is entering me.
Like a stone in a bowl of jasmine flowers, your eyes hit me, and I kept circling around.
The little sparrow is dizzy. In dreams, it flutters every day. When love comes, it jumps and flaps its wings, hitting the sky.
The heart is flying lightly, something is happening at this age.
The anklet is slipping lightly, I don't know where it fell.
Like a green child, the heart was hidden and kept. In the festival crowd, it got lost happily.
Beyond hesitation, words didn't come. The lips thought of saying many things, but seeing your look, they shattered.
Day and night, the heart is spinning like a merry-go-round. In the locked house, a new butterfly is flying.
The little sparrow is dizzy. In dreams, it flutters every day. When love comes, it jumps and flaps its wings, hitting the sky.
The heart is flying lightly, something is happening at this age.
The world that blooms like a flower has been visible until now.
Like a fallen tree, I lay down. After seeing you, life sprouted again. Will I get you as my own? I will ask God.
With braided hair, I turned around. After seeing you, my shyness decreased. I was born on this earth just for you.
Like carrying a burden, the heart is carrying love.
You come in dreams, so my eyes are sleepy.
The little sparrow is dizzy. In dreams, it flutters every day. When love comes, it jumps and flaps its wings, hitting the sky.
